question: Are the classes live or recorded?
answer: All classes are live and interactive. Sessions are conducted via Google Meet or Zoom. Recordings are shared after each session so you can revise at your own pace.

question: Do I need any prior experience to join?
answer: No prior experience is needed for most courses. The HTML & CSS and Web Development Basics courses are designed for absolute beginners. For React and JavaScript Mastery, basic computer knowledge is sufficient.

question: What is the batch size?
answer: Group batches have a maximum of 5 students to ensure personalized attention. 1-on-1 sessions are also available for completely customized learning.

question: How do I enroll?
answer: Simply fill out the enquiry form on this website or send a WhatsApp message. I'll get back to you within 24 hours to discuss your goals and schedule your first session.

question: Will I get a certificate after completing the course?
answer: Yes! A course completion certificate is provided upon successful completion of all sessions and the final project.

question: What if I miss a session?
answer: Every session is recorded and shared. You can also schedule a makeup session in the same week at no extra cost.

question: Is there any EMI or payment plan available?
answer: Yes, I offer flexible payment plans. You can pay in 2 installments for any course. Contact me on WhatsApp to discuss the options.
